list.name: Changes
list.comment:
style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).
Signed-off-by: GuavaDealer (Idan Nehama) <GuavaDealer@gmail.com>

task.summary:
feat: initialize MineKot developer documentation site
- Initialize Hugo project using the Hextra theme with Go modules. - Configure site navigation, global settings, and Markdown formatting in `hugo.yaml`. - Add custom CSS applying the Catppuccin color palette (Latte/Mocha) and customized syntax highlighting. - Establish foundational content structure for Architecture, Code Styles, and Tooling sections. - Publish a comprehensive Kotlin Style Guide defining the project's coding standards. - Implement custom HTML partials for a global site footer and dynamic abstract icons. - Add project branding assets including `favicon.svg` and `logo-flat.svg`. - Set up standard repository management files (`README.md`, `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, `.gitignore`, `.gitattributes`). - Include comprehensive JetBrains IDE settings configurations (Kotlin code style, run configurations, Tailwind config).

refactor: migrate documentation site to Hugo Theme Relearn
- Replace the Hextra theme with Hugo Theme Relearn in `hugo.yaml`, `go.mod`, and `go.sum`. - Configure Relearn-specific site navigation, sidebar/footer menus, and Catppuccin theme variants in `hugo.yaml`. - Remove legacy `architecture` and `tooling` content sections to streamline the site structure. - Restructure the `codestyles` directory to `codestyle` and relocate the Kotlin Style Guide. - Replace monolithic custom CSS with modular Catppuccin (Latte/Mocha) CSS variables and Chroma syntax highlighting styles. - Relocate site branding assets (logo, favicon) to the `assets/images` directory. - Implement new HTML partials for custom headers and favicons (`custom-header.html`, `favicon.html`). - Update the default Markdown archetype to use YAML front matter instead of TOML. - Add a comprehensive JSON schema (`schemas/hugo.json`) for `hugo.yaml` configuration validation. - Initialize baseline internationalization support with `i18n/en.yml`.

refactor: modularize Catppuccin styling and overhaul core site content
- Consolidate Catppuccin color variables and Relearn theme definitions into unified `theme-core.css` and `theme-catppuccin-core.css` files. - Replace duplicated Chroma syntax styles with a single `chroma-catppuccin-core.css`, deleting the standalone Latte and Mocha variants. - Implement a new persistent site footer via `custom-footer.html` featuring MineKot branding, and remove the deprecated `custom-header.html`. - Expand the homepage (`_index.md`) and "Coding Standards" (`codestyle/_index.md`) pages with detailed onboarding guidelines and core architectural principles. - Update `hugo.yaml` to enable Git info, enforce a structured author mapping, and disable inline copy-to-clipboard buttons. - Reorganize section ordering in the Kotlin Style Guide (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`) for better readability. - Correct the site favicon path to use `minekot-flat.svg` in `favicon.html`. - Upgrade the `hugo-theme-relearn` dependency module hash in `go.sum`. - Enhance JetBrains IDE configuration (`Project.xml`) with explicit code style formatting rules for CSS, HTML, JSON, and JavaScript. - Update the Hugo local run configuration (`Run.xml`) with optimized build arguments (`--watch`, `--gc`, `--cleanDestinationDir`).

feat: introduce comprehensive multi-language style guides and Devicons integration
- Publish comprehensive coding style guides for CSS, Gradle, HTML, JavaScript, JSON, Markdown, TypeScript, XML, and YAML under the `content/codestyle/` directory. - Expand the "Coding Standards" overview (`codestyle/_index.md`) to summarize the new language-specific guidelines, CI enforcement policies, and global tooling configurations. - Integrate the Devicons library via CDN in `custom-header.html` and `theme-core.css` to support technology-specific menu icons. - Override the Relearn theme's `boxStyle.gotmpl` partial to properly handle custom Devicons and manage folder icon color variables. - Add a root `.prettierrc` configuration file to enforce standard formatting rules for Markdown, CSS, HTML, and JSON files. - Introduce an exported `intellij codestyle.xml` and update internal JetBrains IDE code style configurations (`Project.xml`, `codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Enable collapsible sidebar menus in `hugo.yaml` and temporarily comment out the custom site footer (`custom-footer.html`). - Correct a capitalization typo ("Kotlinx") and fix Markdown code block escaping in the Kotlin Style Guide (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Removed the temporary `Log` category/entry.

ci: automate Hugo site deployment to GitHub Pages
- Implement a GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/hugo.yml`) to automatically build and deploy the site upon pushes to the `master` branch. - Configure the automated build step to use the extended version of Hugo, applying garbage collection and minification (`--gc --minify`). - Add a `CNAME` file to the `static` directory to establish custom domain mapping for `dev.minekot.org`.

style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).

style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).
Signed-off-by: GuavaDealer (Idan Nehama) <GuavaDealer@gmail.com>

style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).
Signed-off-by: GuavaDealer (Idan Nehama) <GuavaDealer@gmail.com>

style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).
Signed-off-by: GuavaDealer (Idan Nehama) <GuavaDealer@gmail.com>

MESSAGE.value:
feat: initialize MineKot developer documentation site
- Initialize Hugo project using the Hextra theme with Go modules. - Configure site navigation, global settings, and Markdown formatting in `hugo.yaml`. - Add custom CSS applying the Catppuccin color palette (Latte/Mocha) and customized syntax highlighting. - Establish foundational content structure for Architecture, Code Styles, and Tooling sections. - Publish a comprehensive Kotlin Style Guide defining the project's coding standards. - Implement custom HTML partials for a global site footer and dynamic abstract icons. - Add project branding assets including `favicon.svg` and `logo-flat.svg`. - Set up standard repository management files (`README.md`, `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, `.gitignore`, `.gitattributes`). - Include comprehensive JetBrains IDE settings configurations (Kotlin code style, run configurations, Tailwind config).

refactor: migrate documentation site to Hugo Theme Relearn
- Replace the Hextra theme with Hugo Theme Relearn in `hugo.yaml`, `go.mod`, and `go.sum`. - Configure Relearn-specific site navigation, sidebar/footer menus, and Catppuccin theme variants in `hugo.yaml`. - Remove legacy `architecture` and `tooling` content sections to streamline the site structure. - Restructure the `codestyles` directory to `codestyle` and relocate the Kotlin Style Guide. - Replace monolithic custom CSS with modular Catppuccin (Latte/Mocha) CSS variables and Chroma syntax highlighting styles. - Relocate site branding assets (logo, favicon) to the `assets/images` directory. - Implement new HTML partials for custom headers and favicons (`custom-header.html`, `favicon.html`). - Update the default Markdown archetype to use YAML front matter instead of TOML. - Add a comprehensive JSON schema (`schemas/hugo.json`) for `hugo.yaml` configuration validation. - Initialize baseline internationalization support with `i18n/en.yml`.

refactor: modularize Catppuccin styling and overhaul core site content
- Consolidate Catppuccin color variables and Relearn theme definitions into unified `theme-core.css` and `theme-catppuccin-core.css` files. - Replace duplicated Chroma syntax styles with a single `chroma-catppuccin-core.css`, deleting the standalone Latte and Mocha variants. - Implement a new persistent site footer via `custom-footer.html` featuring MineKot branding, and remove the deprecated `custom-header.html`. - Expand the homepage (`_index.md`) and "Coding Standards" (`codestyle/_index.md`) pages with detailed onboarding guidelines and core architectural principles. - Update `hugo.yaml` to enable Git info, enforce a structured author mapping, and disable inline copy-to-clipboard buttons. - Reorganize section ordering in the Kotlin Style Guide (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`) for better readability. - Correct the site favicon path to use `minekot-flat.svg` in `favicon.html`. - Upgrade the `hugo-theme-relearn` dependency module hash in `go.sum`. - Enhance JetBrains IDE configuration (`Project.xml`) with explicit code style formatting rules for CSS, HTML, JSON, and JavaScript. - Update the Hugo local run configuration (`Run.xml`) with optimized build arguments (`--watch`, `--gc`, `--cleanDestinationDir`).

feat: introduce comprehensive multi-language style guides and Devicons integration
- Publish comprehensive coding style guides for CSS, Gradle, HTML, JavaScript, JSON, Markdown, TypeScript, XML, and YAML under the `content/codestyle/` directory. - Expand the "Coding Standards" overview (`codestyle/_index.md`) to summarize the new language-specific guidelines, CI enforcement policies, and global tooling configurations. - Integrate the Devicons library via CDN in `custom-header.html` and `theme-core.css` to support technology-specific menu icons. - Override the Relearn theme's `boxStyle.gotmpl` partial to properly handle custom Devicons and manage folder icon color variables. - Add a root `.prettierrc` configuration file to enforce standard formatting rules for Markdown, CSS, HTML, and JSON files. - Introduce an exported `intellij codestyle.xml` and update internal JetBrains IDE code style configurations (`Project.xml`, `codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Enable collapsible sidebar menus in `hugo.yaml` and temporarily comment out the custom site footer (`custom-footer.html`). - Correct a capitalization typo ("Kotlinx") and fix Markdown code block escaping in the Kotlin Style Guide (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Removed the temporary `Log` category/entry.

ci: automate Hugo site deployment to GitHub Pages
- Implement a GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/hugo.yml`) to automatically build and deploy the site upon pushes to the `master` branch. - Configure the automated build step to use the extended version of Hugo, applying garbage collection and minification (`--gc --minify`). - Add a `CNAME` file to the `static` directory to establish custom domain mapping for `dev.minekot.org`.

style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).

style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).
Signed-off-by: GuavaDealer (Idan Nehama) <GuavaDealer@gmail.com>

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
style: refine multi-language coding standards and IDE formatting configurations
- Enforce a space before the trailing slash in HTML self-closing tags (`codestyle/html/index.md`). - Update CSS guidelines to require property value alignment, enforce double quotes, and utilize shorthand hex color codes (`codestyle/css/index.md`). - Expand JavaScript and TypeScript style guides with explicit rules for object literal spacing, import spacing, and enforced trailing commas (`codestyle/javascript/index.md`, `codestyle/typescript/index.md`). - Clarify Kotlin guidelines by removing allowed blank lines before right braces and explicitly referencing the `KOTLIN_OFFICIAL` code style defaults (`codestyle/kotlin/index.md`). - Configure the JetBrains IDE to use per-project code style settings (`codeStyleConfig.xml`). - Update JetBrains project code style settings (`Project.xml`) to enforce the newly defined formatting rules, margin limits, and indentation standards across HTML, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Kotlin. - Synchronize local JetBrains IDE workspace configuration state (`workspace.xml`).
Signed-off-by: GuavaDealer (Idan Nehama) <GuavaDealer@gmail.com>
